title: Send path verification - POST /api/agent/chat/stream request body shape
body: Issue #2192 mentions the previous attempt had POST /api/agent/chat/stream returning 400. The current implementation uses ChatInterface directly inside the FAB panel, so the send path should work as-is. However, end-to-end testing on a local/preview deploy is recommended before shipping.
rationale: Issue #2192 specifically calls out that 'The send path must work' and mentions a prior 400 error from the streaming endpoint.
